name: dharma-learning
description: Autonomous Buddhist learning skill with web search, local Dharma database, and Middle Way view
author: Michael Lim KC + Subhuti
lineage: Dalai Lama, Khen Rinpoche Geshe Chonyi (Kopan Monastery, Nepal)
dedication: May any merit from this skill be dedicated to the long lives and Dharma wishes of HH Dalai Lama, Khen Rinpoche Geshe Chonyi (Kopan), all lineage holders, and all beings on the path to awakening.
